name: Best Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce can light red kidney beans
15 ounce can dark red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage until done, then drain well.
2. Drain all the beans well.
3. Mix the sausage with the remaining ingredients in a baking dish sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. Serves 12
